items.title: Dashboard main content scaffold
items.scope: frontend — populate SHELL-06 content slot with dashboard-main (ai_RNbBHXRD) region tree: dashboard-content, greeting-row, and responsive dashboard-grid columns; bind CurrentUser context; no widget internals
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: DashboardMain.vue mounts inside DashboardPage content slot with data-bubble-id="ai_RNbBHXRD" on root and child regions ai_RNbBHXRE and ai_RNbBHXRW preserving IR nesting
AC-2: dashboard-grid uses fluid multi-column layout matching Bubble fit_width semantics — left column hosts G - daily check in (ai_RNbBHXRX), right column hosts path/chat/journal/crisis card slots
AC-3: current_user data binding from IR flows through a dashboard composable supplying user display fields to child widget slots without re-implementing header/sidebar chrome
items.layout_notes: SHELL-06 owns page chrome; this item only fills dashboard-main. Grid is two-column on desktop with stacked cards on narrow viewports per Bubble container_layout on ai_RNbBHXRW.

items.title: Greeting card, coaching mode, and quick actions
items.scope: frontend — migrate dashboard-greeting-card (ai_RNbBHXRG): avatar, personalized greeting, mode badge, coaching note, ai_coaching_mode_os dropdown (bTIVE/bTIVQ), and dashboard-quick-actions plan/reflect buttons
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: DashboardGreetingCard.vue preserves ai_RNbBHXRG hierarchy with data-bubble-id on greeting-top (ai_RNbBHXRH), greeting-avatar (ai_RNbBHXRI), greeting-name (ai_RNbBHXRL), mode-pill (ai_RNbBHXRN), and coaching-note (ai_RNbBHXRO)
AC-2: Coaching mode dropdown bTIVQ renders ai_coaching_mode_os options from ENUM-03 with style_ref:bTIVE and InputChanged workflow parity (bTIVW) updating user coaching preference via Supabase client

AC-3: DashboardQuickActions.vue renders ai_RNbBHXRP with dashboard-qa-plan (ai_RNbBHXRQ, Button_accent_) and dashboard-qa-reflect (ai_RNbBHXRS, Button_outline_) routing to /paths and /journal respectively
items.layout_notes: Greeting card is horizontal flex: avatar left, greeting text and mode badge center stack, coaching note below. Quick-actions row sits as sibling group under dashboard-greeting-row (ai_RNbBHXRF), not inside greeting card.

items.title: Micro-commitments row widget
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - micro-commitment (bTJFv) and RG - m-commitment (bTJGH) under dashboard-greeting-row: path session chips with completion state from parent path enrollment context
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: DashboardMicroCommitments.vue renders bTJFv with data-bubble-id and nests RG - m-commitment (bTJGH) preserving RepeatingGroup_list_ style_ref
AC-2: Repeating group cells (bTJGS/bTJGY) display path session titles and completion indicators matching IR text nodes and Group_transparent_ presentation
AC-3: Row visibility and data source mirror Bubble element_ref binding to custom.pathsession under active pathenrollment — read via Supabase client, no adapter passthrough
items.layout_notes: Micro-commitment row spans greeting-row width below greeting card and quick actions; RG cells are horizontal chip list with wrap — preserve fit_width fluid layout from IR.

items.title: Daily check-in card and submit workflow
items.scope: frontend — migrate dashboard-checkin-card (ai_RNbBHXRY): streak badge, mood/energy sliders, reflection input, and checkin-submit workflow creating DailyCheckIn rows via Supabase client (dailycheckin: mood, energy_stress_level, reflection, date, user)
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: DashboardCheckinCard.vue preserves ai_RNbBHXRY tree with data-bubble-id on checkin-card-header (ai_RNbBHXRZ), checkin-streak-badge (ai_RNbBHXRd), and checkin-form (ai_RNbBHXRg)
AC-2: Mood slider (ai_RNbBHXRk) and energy slider (ai_RNbBHXRo) bind to checkin-mood-value and checkin-energy-value text nodes with IR style_ref tokens — no placeholder slider styling
AC-3: checkin-submit-btn (ai_RNbBHXRw) triggers workflow bTIqQ parity: insert dailycheckin record for current user and refresh streak badge from user.daily_check_in_streak_number
items.layout_notes: Check-in card is primary left-column widget under G - daily check in (ai_RNbBHXRX). Form stacks mood group, energy group, reflection MultiLineInput, then submit button — preserve vertical spacing from IR padding.

items.title: Insights and current path cards
items.scope: frontend — migrate dashboard-insights-card (ai_RNbBHXRx) with insights-list repeating insight items and disclaimer, plus G - current path (ai_RNbBHXSf) with path RG, progress bar (DS-02), and next-step label
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: DashboardInsightsCard.vue renders ai_RNbBHXRx with insights-card-header (ai_RNbBHXRy), insights-card-title (ai_RNbBHXSA), insights-list (ai_RNbBHXSB) insight-item groups, and insights-disclaimer (ai_RNbBHXSL) with data-bubble-id markers

AC-2: DashboardCurrentPathCard.vue renders ai_RNbBHXSf with path-card-header (ai_RNbBHXSg), path-name (ai_RNbBHXSm), ProgressBar (DS-02) in path-progress-bar-wrap (ai_RNbBHXSn), and path-next-step (ai_RNbBHXSt) fed by pathenrollment search binding from IR

AC-3: path-card-link (ai_RNbBHXSk) routes to /paths per Bubble Link navigation; insights-list (ai_RNbBHXSB) renders insight-item groups ai_RNbBHXSC (icon ai_RNbBHXSD, text ai_RNbBHXSE) and ai_RNbBHXSF with data-bubble-id markers preserving IR hierarchy
items.layout_notes: Insights card stacks below check-in card in left column. Current path card is first right-column widget with RG - path (bTIrY) cells; progress bar uses fit_height row wrapper (bTIvC) from IR.

items.title: Chat and journal preview cards
items.scope: frontend — migrate G - chat (ai_RNbBHXSM) dashboard-chat-preview-card with prompt chips and chat-preview-link, and G - recent journal (ai_RNbBHXSx) with RG - recent journal entry list — read-only previews routing to /chat and /journal
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: DashboardChatPreviewCard.vue renders ai_RNbBHXSN hierarchy: chat-preview-header (ai_RNbBHXSO), chat-preview-meta (ai_RNbBHXSU), chat-quick-start (ai_RNbBHXSZ) with prompt chips (chip-plan-day ai_RNbBHXSc, chip-reflect-week ai_RNbBHXSd, chip-set-goal ai_RNbBHXSe), and chat-preview-link (ai_RNbBHXSS) with data-bubble-id

AC-2: DashboardJournalPreviewCard.vue renders ai_RNbBHXSx with journal-card-header (ai_RNbBHXSy), journal-card-link (ai_RNbBHXTC), and RG - recent journal (ai_RNbBHXTD) cells showing journal-entry-title (ai_RNbBHXTG), preview (ai_RNbBHXTH), mood (ai_RNbBHXTJ), and date (ai_RNbBHXTK)
AC-3: Chat preview loads last message text into chat-preview-last-msg (ai_RNbBHXSY) via Supabase read; journal RG lists recent JournalEntry rows for current user ordered by date
items.layout_notes: Chat and journal cards stack in right column below current path card. Chat prompt chips are horizontal chip row; journal RG is vertical list with entry-left/entry-right split per ai_RNbBHXTE cell template.

items.title: Crisis card, onboarding banner, and services panel
items.scope: frontend — migrate RE - crisis support instance (bTIfU/bTIdW), G - continue onboarding banner (bTIpm) with resume CTA, and FG - services floating panel (bTJEO) with PathEnrollment RG — page-level overlays outside shell chrome
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: CrisisSupportCard.vue mounts bTIfU CustomElement with data-bubble-id on RE - crisis support root (bTIdW) preserving dashboard-crisis-card (bTIdb), crisis-dash-header (bTIdg), crisis-dash-list (bTIdo), and hotline resource groups (988, textline, samhsa) with IR copy

AC-2: ContinueOnboardingBanner.vue renders bTIpm with icon (bTIps), title/subtitle text (bTIpy/bTIqE), and continue button (bTIqK) visible when onboarding incomplete per AUTH-05 signals; button routes to /onboarding

AC-3: ServicesFloatingPanel.vue renders page-level bTJEO with RG - PathEnrollment (bTJEQ) listing pathenrollment1 search results; panel uses fixed/floating positioning from Bubble FG semantics without altering SHELL header/sidebar
items.layout_notes: Crisis card sits in dashboard-grid right column via bTIfU CE. Continue-onboarding banner is sibling to dashboard-content under dashboard-main (ai_RNbBHXRD), shown conditionally above grid. FG-services (bTJEO) is page-root FloatingGroup with z-index above content — not inside dashboard-main subtree.
